title: Getting Naked: A Burlesque Story
overview: Four performers in the neo-burlesque scene in New York City discover a new identity and belonging in a world of bawdy comedy and striptease. However, they find that this community does not insulate from the harsh reality of life in the city.

trailers.title: GETTING NAKED: A BURLESQUE STORY (2018 Mendocino Film Festival Official Selection)
